case_title: JOSE RAMOS et al VS. ROGER JASON SILVER et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT ROGER JASON SILVER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ATHAN REBELES--GENERAL MANGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---YARET RAMOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT SILVER WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ATHAN REBELOS-DE SOTO CAB GEN. MGR. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---YURET RAMOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY RAMOS, JOSE RAMOS, ADELAIDA C AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER, ROGER JASON DESOTO CAB COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMOS, JOSE RAMOS, ADELAIDA C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, ROGER JASON SILVER, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ROGER JASON SILVER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAR-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
